items.description: External credit bureau output used for underwriting and affordability checks.
items.notes: Retail and SME lending; keep bureau source and pull timestamp for audit.

items.description: Consolidated customer identity profile used for KYC verification.
items.notes: Applies to onboarding and high-risk transaction reviews.

items.description: Outcome and trace of politically exposed person screening.
items.notes: Store match confidence and screening provider metadata.

items.description: Sanctions screening execution trace including list version and match details.
items.notes: Required when sanctions false-positive/true-positive adjudication is needed.

items.description: Documented evidence for origin and legitimacy of funds.
items.notes: Used in cross-border wires and enhanced due diligence scenarios.

items.description: Authority boundary definition for who can approve which case types.
items.notes: Cross-domain governance boundary control and escalation workflows.

items.description: Trace output of transaction monitoring rules/signals tied to the case.
items.notes: Include rule hits and model signal snapshots when available.

items.description: Export package of audit trail records supporting the decision lifecycle.
items.notes: Needed for external audit submission and evidence bundles.

items.description: Attestation proving required secure/prod controls are in place.
Documented rollback procedure for irreversible or high-impact operations.
items.notes: Used when rollback capability gates decision execution.

items.description: Record proving policy/rule definition and ownership for the decision domain.
items.notes: Required when rule_undefined or boundary ownership issues appear.
